titleStmt.title: SII 27.394: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 394. (A.R. No. 277 of 1931-32.) HOSĀḶA, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Broken slab lying on the aśvatthakaṭṭe in front of the Vināyaka temple.

This mutilated record registers a gift of land by Basavaseṭṭi for feeding brāhmaṇas in the feeding house attached to a maṭha. The gift was entrusted to Krishṇa-hebbāra, son of Mādaṇa-hebbāra. It refers to god Gōpīnāthadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu mattaṁ Ādaraṇa seṭi Aḷiya basavaseṭaru maṭhake dharṁma veccaṁ brā
hmaṇa jana 10 ke biṭṭabāḷina kaḍame bāḷu basavaseṭṭiyiṁ ceḷikēriya Ayivaru
halaru tāu baṁda brahmadayada mūladabāḷu Ayi rōḍiya Alasebeṭṭinoḷage
catussīme vivara heddāriyiṁ paḍuva haṁde dēvara gaḍiyiṁ baḍaga hoḷegaḍiyi
ṁ Alasegaḍiyiṁ muḍa kaṁḍikada gaḍiyiṁ gōviṁdahoḷana gaḍiyiṁ teṁka
yi nālku gaḍiyiṁ voḷage gade mu 2 hāne 30 beṭṭu sahavāgi kelanāḍa maṇi
kāṟakēri koḍe kā didu nimittavāgi �yo bāḷanu nimage Aruvāravāgirisite
gadukoṁḍa varaha gadyāṇa 45 �yo hoṁnige baḍivōtada hāne vorave Akkināghu
ṁ ḍugadalū muḍi 9 nu nāyaru māriyāda mādaṇahebbārana maga kru
ṣṇa hebbāra naḍasuvanu yidake Adahoṇe gōvi mādaṇahebbārana maga kōṭa
ṇahebbāra �yobāḷa teṟu muḍi 3 hā 2 mattaṁ Adahāra nāraṇaseṭiya kayyalu
maṇigāṟakarivopaṇaseṭṭi maga koṭaṇaseṭi tānu Aṁṇa heraḷakayyabiḍāru vāravā
gi biṭukoṁḍa radoḷage bāḷacatusīme vivara mūḍa kōṭināgaseṭi gaḍiyiṁ pa
ḍava hāḍigaḍiyiṁ baḍaga nīru hōha sāliṁdaṁ mūḍa mattaṁ nīruhōha sāliṁ teṁkalu yi
catusīme voḷage nāghaṁḍugadalu gade mu The stone is broken here and some line after this are lost. But the the lines is continued.

muḍe 27 tuppa Akkimu 47 Aṁttu
Amu 1421 Upādhyaraṁṇa
ruga Ayiraḍi
Akkimū 3 Ubhayaṁ mu 12 Aṁtū Akkimū 3 ke veccavivara
niyōga maṭhada dharṁmada catrake saha Aki mu yanū basavaseṭi saharaṁ
ṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpūrvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi dhāreneṟadu koṭanu
�yodharṁma dēvastānada pārupatyavanū Ā stānadavarū kuṭuṁbadavarū salla
do yi maṭhada dharṁma dēvastānada voḍatana pārupatyavanū basavaseṭṭa
rū karaṇikara Aḷiya saṁkayagaḷu ṁdu sahiraṁṇyōdaka dāna dhārāpū
rvakavāgi Ācaṁdrārkasthāyiyāgi śrīgōpīnāthadēvaru yāgi dhāreneṟadu
koṭa dharṁmaśāsana yidaṟa saṁkayagaḷu
ruhalaru vicārisuvaru �yodharmmake vo ga biṁ gaḷuhoṟa
pidare vāraṇāsiyali sāvira kavile koṁdadōṣakehōharu . dānapālanayōrmmadhyē dānā
śrēyōnu pālanaṁ dānāsargamavāpnōti pālanāpnōcyutaṁ padaṁ śrīgōpīnāthanēgati
Digital edition of SII 27.394 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
